column2: *CRATED* Spot Free RO/DI 50 Gallon Dual User 150
column7:
Looking for the ultimate pure water system for your water-fed poles?

Want to be able to bring your own spot free water to a job site?

Want to be able to produce spot free water onsite in the event you need more water than 50 gallons?

These 50 gallon tank systems are the perfect solution for any looking to have an all in one system.

Designed utilizing the highest quality components available today.

Each system includes:

50 Gallon Tank

Powder Coated lightweight aluminum frame

(2) Digital Flow Controller (1) for each operator

(2) Hoses of your choice (1) for each operator (with 150' of 3/8" ID hose)

(2) Premium Tucker® hose reels (1) for each operator

(2) RHG USA Made 12v Pumps (1) for each operator

Sediment / Carbon Pre-filtration

40" Low Pressure RO Membrane powered by an RHG 12 Volt Boost Pump

Deionization final stage

Small Compact Design

Replacement Filter Info-

Sediment Pre-Filter

Carbon Pre-Filter

RO Membrane

DI Post-Filter

Bulk DI resin for refilling DI filter

All RHG and Tucker® brand purification systems come with a 5 year warranty and are assembled in the US.

column2: *CRATED* Spot Free RO/DI 50 Gallon Single User 150
column7:
Single water-fed pole user and not interested in a mobile spot free water system?

Want to be able to bring your own spot free water to a job site?

Want to be able to produce spot free water onsite in the event you need more water than 50 gallons?

These 50 gallon tank systems are the perfect solution for any looking to have an all in one system.

Designed utilizing the highest quality components available today.

Each system includes:

50 Gallon Tank

Powder Coated lightweight aluminum frame

Digital Flow Controller

150' of 3/8" ID hose

Premium Tucker® hose reel

RHG USA Made 12v Pumps

Sediment / Carbon Pre-filtration

40" Low Pressure RO Membrane powered by an RHG 12 Volt Boost Pump

Deionization final stage

Small Compact Design

Replacement Filter Info-

Sediment Pre-Filter

Carbon Pre-Filter

RO Membrane

DI Post-Filter

Bulk DI resin for refilling DI filter

All RHG and Tucker® brand purification systems come with a 5 year warranty and are assembled in the US.

Replacement Pressure Gauge
This guage is liquid filled and reads from 0-160 PSI.
This is utilized on the following products.
-110v Booster Pump System
-110v H2Pro RO/DI System
-Tucker® RO/DI Mobile System
-Tucker® RO/DI Fill N Go Tank Systems

Looking for a pole hose that doesn't kink or puncture easily?

This is the absolute best pole hose you can buy.

Hundreds of thousands of feet of this product have been sold.

Outside diameter is 5/16" meaning it fits the push to fit style tee fittings on all the euro pole brushes, not just Tucker®

Your choice of either a 100' or 500' coil.

This is for Tucker carbon fiber water fed poles.

Note: The color of the pole tubing you receive may differ depending on availability.

The Tucker® carbon fiber goosenecks help you reach over deep window ledges.
The water fed pole goosenecks come in 3 sizes and each size is extendable.
12" carbon fiber gooseneck extends to 16"
16" carbon fiber gooseneck extends to 27"
23" carbon fiber gooseneck extends to 36"
Simply remove the tip in your #1 clamp on your Tucker® water fed pole and insert this gooseneck in its place.
Incredibly light weight being that they are made from Carbon Fiber.
These are designed specifically for Tucker's new clamps and will also fit other popular brands on the market today.

Looking for a replacement carbon filter cartridge for 4x40" housings? This is it. These one-time-use carbon filter cartridges fit the 4x40" housings from many manufacturers. Filled with our high-quality activated charcoal carbon, these filters will remove all of the chlorine and chloramines in your water to make it safe for your RO membrane to process. This is NOT the replacement carbon filter cartridge for the 4060 system. The correct replacement carbon filter for the 4060 is the 4 X 30" FILTER CARTRIDGE - CARBON New carbon filters must be flushed independently of other system components. Just disconnect the outlet tube from your carbon filter housing, point in a safe direction and run for 5 minutes. Black water will exit this tube. After flushing, remove plug and connect hose. You also must flush subsequent replacement carbon filters.

TUCKER® ALPHA SCRUBBER WATER FED BRUSH - COMMERCIAL GRADE POLYESTER PAD AND RINSE BAR

The Tucker® Alpha Scrubber is the ultimate commercial grade polyester scrubbing pad for jobs requiring heavy cleaning to remove dried, caked on dirt and grime from any window. The Alpha Scrubber is unique in that it does not have traditional brush bristles and uses a thick scrubbing pad that traps dirt particles and pulls them away from the glass. The over the top rinse bar pours a cascade of water over the top of the brush allowing the water to fan over the glass and quickly rinse any debris from the cleaning area. This allows a fast rinse with minimal effort, saving your body from premature fatigue. The brush includes our proprietary swiveling gooseneck, which allows you to slide the brush across the glass without taking it away from the glass. This kit also comes with 10 replacement pads, giving it a long-life span before needing replacements. This brush is about ease of use, and we think we knocked it out of the park! It comes in two sizes, standard and extra-large. We also offer replacement cleaning pads and velcro to keep your investment functioning for a lifetime!

  • Made In USA
  • Over the Top Rinse Bar
  • Euro Threaded Socket

  • Includes (10) Polyester Scrubbing Pads

The large capacity fuel tank provides longer runtime, an automatic low oil shutdown shuts the engine off if your oil is low and a thermal relief valve on the pump that dumps out built-up hot water if you happen to leave your machine running and unattended. Featuring a durable, hand truck frame design and large 12 in. flat-free wheels, this pressure washer is designed for easy transport.

Easily access hard-to-reach areas with the included 50 ft. steel braided high-pressure hose with quick-connect fittings. This pressure washer includes 4 quick-connect nozzles (15°, 25°, 40° and Soap).


Features of the B4213HACS 4200PSI Pressure Washer:

  • Powered with Honda GX390 engine, capable of handling tough cleaning tasks
  • Commercial-grade Comet triplex pump
  • Aluminum frames reduces weight and resists corrosion
  • 50’ high-pressure steel braided hose with quick-connect feature
  • 36” insulated spray gun wand assembly
  • Safety features include thermal relief valves and safety locks on the spray gun
  • 4 Quick-Connect Nozzles (15°, 25°, 40° and Soap)
  • 12” flat free tires, easily handles going over rough terrain
  • Our products are functionally tested in the factory and may contain minimum residual oil and/or fuel odor
Ball Valve Quick Connect SS 3/8in6000psi

Bleach Magic is an all-purpose alkaline cleaner designed for use on all common residential and commercial finishes including: fabric awnings, patio furniture, roofing materials, siding, wood, decking materials, and pavers. Bleach Magic is a brushless cleaner and works phenomenally in tandem with Heritage Restorer. Bleach Magic works equally well in hot or cold temperatures but should not exceed 120° Fahrenheit. Testing should occur before use on all substrates

Dilutions:


  • Undiluted for extreme stains and soils
  • 4 parts water: 1 part product for heavy stains and soils. Downstream injector from EaCo Chem is designed to dilute at a 4:1 ratio.
  • Dilute as testing indicates

Application Instructions:


  • Pre-wet the surface (do not saturate) with water before applying Bleach Magic. Apply two applications using a low-pressure applicator. Do not rinse between applications.

Rinsing:

  • Use a wide-angle nozzle when rinsing. Pressures that mark or damage the surface should be avoided.

CT Wash is designed to remove light to medium build-up of excess concrete from concrete mixer trucks and construction equipment. CT Wash is great for maintaining concrete trucks or equipment and is highly dilutable when regular maintenance is performed. For heavy build-up removal, use two or three applications spaced five minutes apart. This method is used to extended the dwell times depending on the severity of the build-up.

column3: 12v Delivery Panel w/Controller and Long Range Remote

column7:
Are you the DIY type?
These delivery panels are pretty sweet.  They are made from a lightweight aluminum and easily mount to many different surfaces.
They include the RHG delivery pump with digital flow controller and on/off Remote control.
The pump will siphon your pure water holding tank and deliver the water via a hose (not included) to your water-fed pole.
The digital flow controller allows you to turn up or down the flow/pressure of your pump based on your specific job.  This in turn allows you to conserve your pure water supply for the day.
The remote has multiple functions built in including the ability to turn up, down, and off the flow of water.
Simply hook the inlet side of the pump up to a short hose that siphons your tank and the outlet side of the pump to a hose/reel that feeds your water-fed pole.
Utilizes the V16 Flow Controllers.
The only other thing you need is a 12 volt battery to supply this power.
Not sure how to hook it up?  Give us a call and we'll walk you through the process.

The squeegee drag reduction (slip) is excellent. GG-Solar contains polymeric water softeners to condition the water which greatly reduces dirt re-deposition.

  • Optimized foam level

This service should be charged for in addition to the cleaning, and may need to be reapplied every year or so depending on the environment.

Powered by a Honda GX390 electric start engine and paired with a General triplex pump, this unit pushes out 4,200 PSI at 4.2 GPM—making it the ultimate solution for demanding industrial, agricultural, and commercial cleaning tasks.

Equipped with a 12V diesel-fired Beckett burner, a heavy-duty steel frame, and premium accessories, the HW4013HG is ready to take on your dirtiest jobs with professional-grade durability, power, and performance.

The experts at Moerman have developed a new, highly concentrated soap to revolutionize the window cleaning industry; the Squeeze Deluxe Window Cleaning Concentrate. Instead of wasting product by adding it to the water in your bucket that gets sloshed out or dumped, this soap is designed for direct application to your washer sleeve. Improvements to the formula mean it is now 90% decomposable in 28 days and it is made from 60% plant and renewable materials.
This solution produces a generous froth on the glass for easy visibility when completing high-level pole work. It is easy to squeegee off with the fantastic glide it generates and the pleasant smell enables it to be used in customers' homes for indoor work.
The bottle was shaped to perfectly fit in the side pocket of the Moerman Side Kit Pouch to keep it handy for quick application throughout the job. Each application lasts for multiple windows. NuTopp is a treatment made for asphalt shingles that are drying out, cracking, or losing flexibility. And if you do roof washing all the time, you probably know how common that is. NuTopp helps by going deeper than surface-level coatings, and it does that through something called diffusion.

So what is diffusion? It’s when the sun heats the roof and slowly pulls the product deeper into the asphalt binder which is the part of the shingle where most of the damage happens. As that happens, NuTopp starts replacing the stuff that’s been lost over time like the oils that used to keep the shingle flexible and sealed.


Here’s how NuTopp works:

  • Bio-based oils replace the lighter parts of the asphalt called maltenes, which break down from heat, UV, and oxidation
  • A penetrating oil softens the shingle so the product can move deeper
  • A rejuvenating oil breaks up hardened asphaltenes and helps them recombine with fresh maltene-like components
  • An adhesion modifier strengthens the bond between the asphalt and its granules and improves water resistance

Altogether, that brings back the way the asphalt flows and softens, which is what gives the roof its flexibility and protection in the first place.

That way, you can give more value to your customers by helping them hold off on a full roof replacement and show that you care more than just about appearances.

Introducing the ProTool Pump, a versatile and reliable solution designed for various water and chemical applications. Whether you need a robust pump for pure water production in RO (Reverse Osmosis) systems or efficient spraying for chemical applications, the ProTool Pump delivers exceptional performance and durability.

With its pump regulated Pressure mode and a maximum pressure of 90 psi, this quality pump ensures consistent water or chemical flow for your specific needs. The 12v permanent magnet motor pump provides reliable operation, while its thermal protection feature enhances safety and longevity.

Featuring quick-connect ports for easy replacement (quick connects not included), the ProTool Pump streamlines maintenance, ensuring hassle-free operation. Its 1/2-inch slide ports further facilitate convenient installation and compatibility with standard fittings.

This pump is capable of running dry, offering added flexibility and reliability in various applications. It will continuously run when powered on, providing uninterrupted performance when needed.

The ProTool Pump also includes a heat sink (not shown in picture) to maintain optimal operating temperature, even under demanding conditions. Whether you're boosting water pressure in RO systems or applying chemicals with precision, trust the ProTool Pump to deliver consistent and reliable performance every time.

column7: Paver Sealer Remover (PSR) is an environmentally friendly, biodegradable, low odor paint stripper designed to remove multiple layers of various types of coatings. PSR contains no Methylene Chloride, N-Methyl Pyrolidone or caustics. PSR performs by penetrating and softening the paint film. The all natural and biodegradable characteristics make PSR safe, easy to use and practical for most stripping applications. PSR will not damage tools and equipment like most chemical strippers. Available in both spray and gel formulations.

SEALTHANE is a 2 part, aliphatic, water based, chemical resistant, acrylic urethane. It is an environmentally friendly, protective finish designed to seal, protect and enhance the color of concrete and pavers. SEALTHANE penetrates into the surface and produces a tough, durable, clear film that will enhance the color of the substrate. SEALTHANE binds joint sand and protects against water damage, staining and UV ray damage. SEALTHANE protects decorative vinyl flakes on concrete floors and will not yellow. SEALTHANE also provides mildew protection and tremendous resistance against wear from both foot and vehicular traffic. SEALTHANE may be applied to damp surfaces which allows for same day cleaning and sealing.

Most every system on the market uses a 40" RO Membrane that can supply 1 pole on line pressure. Using (2) 40" RO Membranes gives you more flow and capacity, but the size and weight makes it completely impractical in a mobile application.
At Tucker® we have the unique opportunity to produce 30" RO Membranes that produce nearly the same water as the leading 40" RO Membranes on the market and when we combine 2 of them you get the performance of 80" or RO Membrane, but in a much more compact design. How's that? We use much lower operating pressure RO Membranes than anyone else in the market.

The Tucker® 4 x 30" RO Membrane is the best choice for any system that utilizes a 30" Membrane. Upgrade your RO system today!
These 30" RO Membranes are designed to operate at extremely low operating pressures making them the perfect choice for the Tucker® RO/DI systems as well as any other system on the market.
Consider changing your RO membrane when it has begun to remove less than 80% of the impurities in the water. The fewer impurities the RO can remove, the more you will spend on DI filter replacements.

The Tucker Alpha Hybrid Water Fed Brush is the ultimate commercial window cleaning brush. You won’t find another brush of this quality, with this many features at this price point any where else.

If you're looking for more flow out of your pole hose you may want to consider this option. Typical pole hose is 3/16" ID. This pole hose is 1/4" ID allowing for higher flow rates from your purification system to your brush. If you're utilizing a rinse bar and not getting enough flow at the brush these often will help. The biggest hurdle for most to running this larger size is that there are no fittings regularly available to connect this larger hose to the smaller push fittings on all of the brushes etc. So we had them custom made for us from aluminum.
Comes with custom aluminum 5/16" push fittings on each end. If you'd like to run a length longer than 100' you can connect these together with a 5/16" union fitting. Note you will likely need to run this hose on the outside of your pole due to its larger diameter.

This light weight, general purpose water fed brush is ideal for any skill level window cleaner. Nylon is an excellent tip to glass cleaning material, and when the fibers are laid down on the glass, they glide across the surface easily. This dual trim brush splits the best of both worlds by allowing the window cleaning professional to lay the longer outer edges of the brush against glass, allowing the brush to move freely and easily, while the inner monofilament bristles remain in a vertical position allowing the friction from the tips to scrub away caked on dirt and grime. The splay of the outer bristles also allows the bristle tips to scrub into the corners and trim of the window.

This American made brush comes with 2 plumbed pencil jets, which is ideal for situations where extra scrubbing is required.

TUCKER® ALPHA PREMIUM BOAR BRISTLE WATER FED BRUSH

We consider this brush to be the absolute best investment you can make in your window or solar panel cleaning company.

The Tucker Alpha Boar Bristle brush is the pinnacle of Water Fed brushes. This premium boar bristle window cleaning brush is built around our dual trim, 4 pencil jet brush but with some serious additions that even the most seasoned window cleaning professional will appreciate. It includes an over the top rinse bar as well as our swiveling gooseneck. This setup allows complete flexibility in cleaning to your specific style. You can choose to rinse directly through the 4 internal pencil jets, the over the top rinse bar, or using a Y-adapter you can use both at once. The swiveling gooseneck allows the experienced professional to rock the brush back and forth on the surface of the window, while maintaining contact and rinse power.

Boar hair is a superior cleaning bristle recommended for the experienced professional. Unlike Nylon monofilament, boar bristle cleans in any orientation. No matter whether the tip or the flat of the bristle is in contact with the glass, the natural fibers will scrub and remove dirt quickly and efficiently.

Note: The rinse bar is not typically intended to be run simultaneously with the brush jets. To do this, you would need to attach an additional 5/16" Y Fitting and a few inches of standard 5/16" OD Pole Tubing. A kit for this is available HERE.
